notableEvents.label: Jac Caglianone GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone grounds into a double play, shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Bobby Witt Jr. out at 2nd. Jac Caglianone out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Nick Loftin. Nick Fortes to 2nd. Nick Fortes advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Nick Loftin.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Ben Williamson batting, Chandler Simpson picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Michael Massey.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Junior Caminero batting, Yandy Díaz picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Michael Massey.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Vilade plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade hit by pitch. Junior Caminero to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Loftin to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Salvador Perez. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Eric Cerantola. Ryan Vilade scores. Jonny DeLuca to 3rd. Chandler Simpson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Loftin to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Salvador Perez. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
